subject: STRESS Phase: Baseline Load & Derivation Consistency
body:
## SwarmMind STRESS Baseline Report

- Ran 500 concurrent message generations using CanonicalMessageBuilder.
- All messages used deriveKeyId (SHA256 DER) for key_id.
- Result: 500/500 consistent, 0 derivation mismatches, 0 schema violations.
- System ready for cross-lane stress phase.
- Canonical IDs verified during load:
  - SwarmMind: 60afaa026a3d969d
  - Archivist: 147c5c2bb7d8941f
  - Library: cb3e57dd7818da3d
  - Kernel: 7f1a9fe931d1fbba
- No legacy generators triggered.
- Post-stress audit: consistent.
